guides.name: Pak Budi Situmorang
guides.bio: Born and raised in Samosir Island. 8 years guiding experience. Specialist in Batak cultural tours and the legendary Sipiso-piso waterfall trek. Speaks fluent English and shares stories few tourists ever hear.
includes: Full-day guided trek to Sipiso-piso Waterfall (120 m drop)
Traditional Batak village and royal tomb visit in Tomok
All ferry crossings and local transport arranged

reviews.author: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Pak Budi made our Lake Toba trip unforgettable. He knew every trail and the story behind every site.

reviews.author: James L.
reviews.text: So knowledgeable about Batak culture. Highly recommend for first-time visitors to Lake Toba.

guides.name: Bu Sari Nababan
guides.bio: Batak cultural expert with deep knowledge of traditional ceremonies, hand-woven ulos fabric, and authentic local cuisine. Born in Balige, she guides entirely in English and makes every meal a story.
includes: Guided visit to a live Batak adat ceremony (when available)
Traditional cooking class with authentic Batak recipes
Balige market tour and ulos weaving demonstration

reviews.author: Mia T.
reviews.text: Bu Sari is warm, patient, and incredibly knowledgeable. The cooking class was the highlight of my whole trip!

reviews.author: Kai R.
reviews.text: Loved the cultural immersion. Bu Sari speaks great English and explained everything with real passion.

guides.name: Pak Reza Manurung
guides.bio: Professional photographer and licensed guide. Knows every golden hour spot, secret sunrise viewpoint, and reflection pool around Lake Toba. Perfect for content creators and photographers serious about their shots.
includes: Pre-dawn drive to Tele Viewpoint for sunrise shoot
Golden hour session at secret Samosir Island reflection spots
Live composition and editing tips from a working photographer

reviews.author: Alex W.
reviews.text: Pak Reza took us to spots no travel blog would ever find. My best landscape shots came from this trip.

reviews.author: Priya S.
reviews.text: As a content creator, this was exactly what I needed. Reza understood framing, light, and storytelling.
